statement: In every magma, Equation 3199 (`x = (((y * z) * y) * y) * z`) implies Equation 1470 (`x = (x * y) * (z * (z * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0189
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) y) y) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x y) (op z (op z y)))
